allow: PowerShell(python -m black --check src tests 2>&1; python -m pylint src/winback tests 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15; python -m pytest 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell($py = ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $py\)\) { $py = "py" }; & $py -m black --check src tests 2>&1; "----PYLINT----"; & $py -m pylint src/winback tests 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 12; "----PYTEST----"; & $py -m pytest 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell($py = ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; & $py -m black --check src tests 2>&1; "----PYLINT----"; & $py -m pylint -j1 src/winback tests 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15; "----PYTEST----"; & $py -m pytest 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15)
